action.reasoning: Observation: Crash due to dimension mismatch (cached FPS are 2048-dim from single Morgan radius but model set to 4096 for radius 2+3 concat); train.py truncated leading to incomplete loop; no metrics.jsonl in recent runs. Best AP still 0.1633. Analysis: Cache/model inconsistency root cause of RuntimeError; previous NaN issues fixed by masking but model capacity and FP representation limit performance. PyG remains unusable. Decision: Rewrite all files for consistency (single radius=2, 2048 input_dim, hidden=768, layers=4, dropout=0.1), add full mini-batch training with DataLoader (bs=4096), per-epoch metrics.jsonl logging, grad clip, robust masked loss and AP calc, ReduceLROnPlateau(patience=10), train 60 epochs. This should recover and slightly improve AP while enabling curves; submit_eval on best.pt.
